_canonical-ok: @canonical-ok — 'anima-v3' is the campaign's canonical identity, not a version suffix on a file: it is a distinct clean-slate campaign whose ONLY inheritance from the discarded 'anima' (v1) is a set of sealed measured verdicts (ARCHITECTURE.json -> salvage).
